llm_eval.notes: Narrow single-purpose metric CLI; reuses evaluate() via importlib instead of duplicating logic; runs end-to-end (missing-file -> prints 0.0 exit 0 per doc); read-only, no network/secret/destructive ops. Deductions: no PEP-723 # /// script /// frontmatter; unused 'import sys'; json.loads unguarded (acceptable fail-loud).
